[F12] [MEDIUM] Only a single happy-path fork test; no unit/mock test, no rate-mapping or float-conversion assertions
[F14] [MEDIUM] Only a single fork happy-path value is tested; no mocked edge cases (zero rate, max, non-1e18) for getSFLRPerFLR18
[F15] [MEDIUM] NatSpec semantics ('ETH per FLRETH' / 'FLRETH per ETH') are asserted, not verified, and the underlying method names invert that mapping
[F20] [MEDIUM] Public ankr RPC default in LibFork makes the entire fork test suite depend on an unowned, mutable endpoint that no test or CI step pins
